## Summary

Describe the problem clearly.

## Area

- skill routing
- template generation
- docs or release metadata
- verification scripts

## Expected behavior

What should have happened?

## Actual behavior

What happened instead?

## Verification

What command or prompt did you run?

## Support tier

Was this on a GA, Beta, or Preview path?
